parityMeta.describes: SR-2 validateReplacementExerciseId + isSyntheticReplacementExerciseId probe coverage. validateProbes cover valid display ids, an override id, unknown ids, empty / whitespace, and synthetic ids (which validation rejects). syntheticProbes cover the /__(?:auto_)?alt(?:_|$)/ regex boundaries: __alt_ / trailing __alt / __auto_alt_ / trailing __auto_alt match; bare 'alt', non-boundary __altx, and plain ids do not. Also runs buildReplacementOptions over lat-pulldown (no equipment) for a baseline option list.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Both functions are clockless and pure → generatedAtPolicy 'none'.
